name: Good Sleep Company
short_description: Swap dreams to more suitable, as sweet FOR PAID USERS.
detailed_description:
"Good Sleep Company" is a simulation game with puzzle elements.

By swapping between different types of dreams, you must maximize customer satisfaction.

Work together with Ellie, the head of the company, to complete your 10-day shift.

And above all—make sure you don’t run out of funds.

Main Playing

Dreams are sweet, good, bad or nightmare. They affect customer's satisfaction.
Swapping them, keep satisfactions.

Only when they wake up matters. After all, they won’t remember anyway.

Customers have like and dislike dream. And the satisfaction conditions and fluctuations vary depending on the customer's plan.
Customers on cheaper plans tend to have a higher tolerance for nightmares, but if they don’t get the results they want, they may demand compensation or cancel their subscription.

Upgrade

Every day, you can choose one upgrade from three options.

Something that stops time

Something that changes a dream to a different type

Something that analyzes customer preferences

Something that slows down satisfaction decline

etc...

Choose upgrades that match your playstyle and prepare for even tougher situations.

Revenue and Customers

Customer satisfaction upon waking directly affects your revenue.

For paid plan customers, if their satisfaction drops below a certain level, they will wake up immediately and demand the maximum compensation fee. If compensation alone is manageable, you can make up for it elsewhere—but some may choose to cancel their subscription entirely.

As your customer base shrinks, the new customers that appear are likely suffering from nightmares. Now, how should you handle these nightmares?

Or perhaps... should you take the risk of running at a loss and just...

About Demo Version

  • First and second day contained.

  • 2nd day is special stage mid-game difficulty.

  • Save data is not compatible full version.
